extraction.one_line_summary: CLARK Simon won a six-man breakaway sprint after POGACAR attacked aggressively on cobbles while VINGEGAARD suffered mechanical issues requiring VANART's yellow jersey sacrifice.
tactical_patterns: VANART abandoned stage win opportunity to pace back VINGEGAARD after mechanical, revealing Jumbo's co-leadership resource drain vulnerability.
POGACAR attacked solo off front group on cobbles with 25km remaining, gaining time while rivals chased mechanicals.
BETTIOL pulled exceptionally hard for POGACAR just before cobbles started, UAE using Italian domestique as disposable cobbles specialist.
PAULUS attacked breakaway with 1km left but was caught by chasers doing organization work, revealing poor sprint timing.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Soloed off breakaway with 25km remaining on cobbles, gained 52 seconds on main group, proving cobbles versatility beyond expected
rider_signals.VANART Wout: neutral: Sacrificed personal stage win chances to pace VINGEGAARD back after mechanical, limiting losses to 1:04 but revealing team leadership burden
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: Required bike change with incorrect sizing chaos, needed race leader's help to limit losses, exposed mechanical vulnerability
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: Lost more time than other GC riders, forcing Jumbo to split team resources between two off-the-back leaders
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: negative: Punctured early and couldn't match cobbles pace, unexpected weakness from 2021 breakout performer
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: negative: Not up to cobbles standard despite palmares, surprising underperformance on terrain specialty
rider_signals.BETTIOL Alberto: positive: Pulled hard for POGACAR before cobbles despite not being pure domestique, UAE tactical depth signal
